transcript.text:
She's the person that eats a lot of ramyun noodles
[Let's eat 10!]
Can you finish that?
[This is a regular meal for her]
[Let's go!]
[Oh my]
[And dessert?]
[She's scary...]
[Ramyun and Apple collaboration starting now!]
[Where is this place?]
Hello everyone
Shush
I'm at Chungju today
I've been promoting our country's fruits recently
I'm here for apples today
Can you see the trees?

Way bigger than my fist
Those guys...
They're pretty
Take in some fresh air
They're not all ripe yet
But some are completely red Pretty
Apple
Shush
[Let's go find out about apples]
[Chungju Hanteo Farm]
Hello
-Tzuyang? -Yes!
-How can you eat so well? -You've seen them?
I know that you can eat a lot
How are these apples so big?
Because I know what I'm doing

I heard that this farm has been passed down for 3 generations
I'm 2nd My son is 3rd
I planted these with my dad
Follow me
I'll show you the very first tree
Very first?
This one needs a senior-tree treatment
Planted back in 1969
How old is that?
53 years old
Really old
Is this it?
Not "it" A senior...
Right Apologies
[An apple tree that's still full of life after 53 years]
This part was treated after being sick

This tree is healthy now
I'm here to harvest the apples today Where can I go?
My son is over there
Let's go
Tzuyang is here
Hello
You can eat this whole lane, right?
Maybe 1 whole tree
It's not time to harvest yet
But there are baby trees
Those are ripe right now
So we can go harvest those
-Let's head there -Yes, I'd love to try
Who is that?
We'll be working together
I'm a YouTuber

-The person that eats a lot of ramyun noodles! -Yes, how did you know?
I saw you on YouTube
-Let's eat some ramyun later! -I'd love that
Let's get some apples now
1 apple=1 ramyun
That's a lot
5 apples for 1 ramyun
I'll teach you now
Hold the basket
Hold the scissors
Grab the prettiest one
Hold the bottom
And pull it up
More more more
There you go
-That's it? -Yes

Then cut the top
That's it And be gentle when you put it in the basket
[Ready now!]
That's good
15 apples, so 3 packs of ramyun
I am a big fan of yours
Thank you
Since you first debuted on AfreecaTV
I've gifted 100 star balloons too
It's been 3 years since I moved here And I've fallen in love with apples
This is honey
Do you want to see how pretty it can get?
Look how shiny it is
Can I eat this one?
Wait give me a sec
I will split this in half for you

Dad!
He did it Wow, amazing
Try it
Well?
Really delicious
Very crunchy
So juicy that the sweetness is dripping out of the apple
I love the texture
I wish you can be the model for our apple farm
Are apples in season right now?
[August to October depending on the type]
Should I get a bite too?
We've done well, right?
Good job
We usually eat ramyun for our breaks Is that okay with you?
I love ramyun

You've picked about 60 apples I'll give you 10 ramyuns
That's too much, no?
I will help you if you need
I'll be fine
Cook more if you guys want some
-Great job today -Thank you
They gave me ramyun
I've never seen this brand before
It's a...
Potato ramyun?
Vegetarian?
Wait... Vegetarian?
Made with flour and other organic ingredients
I'm excited to try this one though
I will be eating this potato ramyun and apples today
We didn't get to pick too many of the apples because it's not really harvesting season yet

It was a fun experience nonetheless
Seasoning powder first
Eating ramyun after working is the best
Let's cook 10
I picked these and they're very pretty
I'll eat them for dessert
The pot...
This can fit like 25 servings It's huge
It smells good
It may seem like I'm cooking like 2 packs But it's because the pot is really big
Like 5L of water
-Are you eating out here for the video? -Yes
-Can you finish all 10? -Yes
It's boiling!
How can you eat all that at once?
I eat like this everyday

You would pass out if you only eat 1 pack
Hi
Really cute
Looks great
The portions look small on camera But there's a lot
Let's get this much
Almost 1 pack
The lid is huge too
Bon appetit
Chewy and tasty noodles
-Tzuyang -Yes?
Radish kimchi
Ramyun without kimchi is like buns with no red beans
Thank you very much
[Radish water kimchi too]
Cabbage kimchi first

This radish kimchi looks scrumptious
-How is it? -Amazing
These might be better because the noodles are slippery
Thank you
Thank you
Leave leftovers if you can't finish it
[I don't think there will be any leftovers]
Some soup too
I'm scooping like 1 pack at a time
Ramyun is all about the ambiance
Flavors are important too But eating ramyun outdoors is the best
I tried the apple at the farm
And it was so good Even if they were not fully ripe
As sweet as honey And really crunchy
October 24th is Apple Day here
I hope many of you guys can enjoy some apples on this day

I turned the fire back on
To warm it up
That's great
Eating 10 packs was light work because I'm eating outdoors
Location plays a big part
Camp sites/outdoors for ramyun
Rooftop for pork belly
Billiard/pool places for black bean noodles
Outdoor ramyun is the best
Apples look even pretty during sunset
And they're not fully ripe
They will be beautiful later
There are farm experience events I recommend doing orchard experiences
All of it
It's getting chilly now
It's starting to get cold these days

The chunks are really big
Big carrot and mushroom chunks
You must eat all of these as dessert
I still have room in my stomach
We've seen enough Props to you
Apples now Can I pick it myself?
Thank you
Thank you
So sweet
But not just sweetness I love the smell
Tastes better than ramyun
So good
-Isn't orchard-life really hard? -It is
But I try to enjoy it as much as I can
These are relatively new
Golden apple

Apples are red, right?
But these are yellow
Yes, it looks completely different
Yellow apple
It really is yellow
-Will there be gold inside? -That'd be nice
Thank you
It tastes different
Sweet and sour
Not bitter
Refreshing flavors
Very juicy Full of juice
Eat lots of apples It's good for you
Short and to the point
Show lots of support
A lot of farmers are going through a tough time because of climate changes

Eating apples will help apple farmers
Us farmers will work hard to provide delicious apples
So again, please show support Thank you
I came to the apple orchard to harvest and eat the apples
And they were very delicious
I hope you guys can also have some apples for Apple Day and since apples are in season
-Thanks everyone -Eat lots of apples!
[Looks and tastes delicious]
